feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Temptation is One Hell of a Thing
entry.summary:
Author: acatcam

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,676Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 319

Summary: Bruce Wayne never expected to walk into a church again - let alone with his four-year-old son in his arms. But when a meeting with Clark Kent, a priest. It turns into more than polite conversation, Bruce finds himself disarmed by a man who shouldn’t have surprised him at all. Clark is broad-shouldered, and impossibly kind; a believer in things Bruce turned his back on the day of his parents’ funeral. Bruce is skeptical, Clark is steadfast. Their ideologies clash from the moment they sit across from one another: billionaire pragmatism versus the faith of a priest. But somewhere between coloring books at Clark’s desk and quiet invitations to community fairs, a dangerous warmth grows. Bruce doesn’t know how to name it, and Clark doesn’t dare. Because whatever is happening between them - it shouldn’t. Bruce pushes, searching for the language he can’t bring himself to say aloud, while Clark whispers what he shouldn’t confess at all: I can’t. A vow binds him to the Church, but his heart betrays him in every secret meeting, every glance held too long. It shouldn’t work. It can’t work. But it does. And as much Clark Kent prays, temptation seeps through.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: under pressure
entry.summary:
Author: tazatouille

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,146Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: “This is very childish,” Bruce says, looking up at him despairingly. “Even for you.” “I’m gonna ignore that last part,” Clark tells him, leaning down. He can feel the rise and fall of Bruce’s chest underneath him. Admittedly, if Bruce tried hard enough he could probably push Clark off of him, but he didn’t seem annoyed enough to make an attempt. Though, Bruce would never admit that the way his eyebrows are knit right now. That and… Clark is currently using some super strength to keep him where he wants him. “I told you to stay.” “So your solution was to sit on top of me?” Bruce hits Clark’s thigh, which he barely feels. He huffs and drops his head back onto the pillow. “You know, there are more fun situations we could be in at the moment.” --- Clark wants to know the truth.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Every Inch of You
entry.summary:
Author: acatcam

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,220Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 526

Summary: “This is a love story.” | “This is a detective story.” When Clark Kent follows a lead into Gotham, he doesn’t expect to find himself face-to-face with the city’s true guardian: a bat with fangs, claws, and a half-feral silhouette in the dark. Suspicious, circling him like prey, Batman tests every ounce of Clark’s resolve - only for Clark’s soft, fumbling devotion to slip through anyway (“What the hay, are those fangs?”). Between the silk shawls and champagne smiles of Bruce Wayne, Gotham’s pretty boy prince, and the blood-hungry shadow of the Bat, Clark finds himself caught between two men - one golden, one monstrous - and falling for both. Too earnest, too desperate, too willing to kneel if it means being near him. Or: three ways Clark Kent breaks Bruce Wayne’s walls by humiliating himself, by offering himself, and by never stopping.

entry.title: Worst First (Impression)
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,368Chapters: 11/16Kudos: 161

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.

entry.title: Main Event
entry.summary:
Author: prettiestbatattheball

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,038Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: "Bloody hell" Constantine, saw the same thing Batman saw. An absolute drugged up BANE, that definitely wouldn't be able to pull his punches and ensure a safe fight. "Yeah, no. I call a safety stop. I can't let you fight in that condition. I don’t know what you injected, but there is a zero-drug policy, including anything enhancing" Before Constantine could actually announce that to the ring commentators or on ring staff, Batman pulled the cape from his shoulders and let it fall outside of the ring. With precision he tightened his gloves, eyes never leaving BANE. "You won't."   Constantine stared at him for a second, the crowd began to mutter amongst them, Batman could feel the uncertainty and anger radiate from them in waves. “They paid. They get a fight.” “B, this is insane! Look at him! He’ll break you if he won’t k...” “Enough. Start the match.” Constantine sneered, but there was nothing he could do. With an angry wave, he signaled the bell ringer. - Or Bruce Wayne becomes THE wrestler Batman, adopts a bunch of children, falls in love and tries to navigate all of that while also try to learn to be himself again. Whatever that means

entry.title: The Weight of Never Leaving
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,447Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Jason Todd has been dead for six hours and is already at the garden wall. Martha Wayne runs the perimeter. Thomas holds the suppression. The new ghost doesn't wait for orientation — he has three years of field intelligence and a shit list and unfinished business with every name on it. Above them, Bruce Wayne in the cave listening to Morrow's anniversary digging for the first time with his eyes open. Clark Kent in the city, within reach, for now. Alfred Pennyworth with medication on the nightstand and a very specific idea of where he wants to die. The Weight of Never Leaving is the third book of The House We Never Leave. It is the one where the fracture completes, the talon surfaces, a fourteen-year-old with a surveillance file and no survival instincts rings the doorbell at dusk, and Alfred Pennyworth dies in his chosen place. Clark was right. Bruce chooses the house anyway. He stands at the window. He does not run after him. Every heartbeat hurts.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Phantom Robin
entry.summary:
Author: Scarletred1990

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,154Chapters: 36/?Kudos: 817

Summary: Danny wasn't a Fenton. He wasn't their original child, in fact, he was their nephew. A nephew they lied to. They thought they were helping him, but all it did was cause him to resent them. Cause him to run away. He needed to fix this mistake he unknowingly made.Dick wasn't a Wayne, but he liked pretending to be. It felt better than remembering that he was abandoned by someone he thought he could trust. Someone he thought would never leave his side. Someone who wasn't there for their deaths.Yet, they couldn't stay away from each other for too long. After all, they were two halves of the same whole.

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 112,217Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 576

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Light the Fuse.
entry.summary:
Author: the_gay_one_part_2

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,221Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: “You were exposed to an unknown variant of Kryptonite,” Bruce cut in. “Your behaviour was altered.” Clark stares at him for a moment, ears slightly pink, then smiles. “Right… yeah— well Lois has an idea… You know, to deal with the issue,” Bruce watched him curiously. He cleared his throat and rubbed the back of his neck, feeling increasingly awkward under his intense gaze. “Well… um— Lois thinks that we should… lean into it.” or: Superman gets hit by Pink Kryptonite in an explosion and begins to realise some things about himself.

entry.title: Wayne Chronicles
entry.summary:
Author: Batsy_bat_YAW

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,370Chapters: 4/50Kudos: 6

Summary: A lot happens in the Batfamily, from family meetings to family fun, all the way to dangerous situations...They have been through a lot, but they stick together through it all. So I present to you a slice of life in all its aspects, from the bloody, painful days, the dramatic days, to the fluffy family days. I am proud to present Wayne Chronicles, from the Batboys, Daddy Bats, Agent A, and me. A flowing story where each pretty long 'oneshot' connects like episodes in a TV series. Enjoy! *A LOT of Jason and Bruce having a healthy relationship (guys, I need this), family bonding, Tim coffee addiction, a bit of Jason angst, a lot of injuries, and a few kidnappings, BRUCE BEING A GOOD DAD, The JLA are FRIENDS FOR ONCE, so Beware!* !WARNING! Regular updates (most of the time), there will be periods of silence cuz i will be working on a lot of storylines at once for this, blood, some gore (note the sarcasm), stories that will play with your emotional spectrum, and finally cliffhangers! Also, this was written over the years, so my writing will improve from chapter to chapter.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: After the world ended
entry.summary:
Author: Blue_Frog

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,127Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 38

Summary: Billionaire Bruce Wayne knew the world was fucked the second it was announced that there were aliens. His only focus was keeping himself, Alfred, and his boys safe at the manor, but when they are taken as prisoners of war, it becomes much harder for Bruce to keep his boys together.
